description: Allow Term::TailCall in natively_callable bodies (currently excluded). Requires inserting an explicit GC safepoint check before return_call so a hot recursive loop yields to the GC at a reasonable cadence — the trampoline used to provide this implicitly via per-iteration dispatch. Also requires picking the calling convention carefully so mutual-recursion between native fns with different arities still TCOs.
title: VR.6 follow-up: safepoint-aware native TailCall for non-parking recursion
